goal: 统一修复日志捕获的3个错误: ①Logger Error序列化→{} ②API Key加密跨会话失效401 ③全局快捷键注册失败降级

coverage_checklist.error_serialize: assert: transport 中 Error 实例不再序列化为 {}，保留 message+stack
coverage_checklist.api_key_plaintext: assert: useSettings 移除加密逻辑，API Key 直接存 localStorage
coverage_checklist.shortcut_fallback: assert: 全局快捷键失败时注册窗口级 keydown 监听+IPC通知 renderer
coverage_checklist.typecheck_pass: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
coverage_checklist.tests_pass: assert: bun run test 通过
